## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Additional manual verification described below when needed

## Notes

- Docs updated when user-facing behavior changed
- Config changes documented when new keys were added
- Secrets, tokens, logs, generated databases, and local workspace artifacts reviewed and excluded
